required_preferences.fact: Listens to crime thriller audiobooks during flights and client travel — avoids reading on screens to minimize wrist strain

supersedes.fact: Reads crime thrillers on her Kindle during flights — never brings physical books on work trips

required_preferences.fact: Has casual breakfasts or coffee with her brother several times a week at home, rather than a formal scheduled brunch out on weekends

supersedes.fact: Schedules a weekly brunch with her brother and never makes other plans during that time

required_preferences.fact: Monitors her blood pressure every morning after waking up and logs results in a designated health app, never skips a day
Does all grocery shopping on Saturday mornings — never orders groceries online
Starts each morning with 10 minutes of guided meditation — never checks her phone before this routine
Performs prescribed wrist stretches and exercises daily after work to manage carpal tunnel symptoms

persona: A 28-year-old junior auditor working at a multinational corporation
